Title: Responsible Server Path
Message: You took the diagnostic and let SafePrep Alcohol build your personal study plan. That is how professionals prepare.

Title: Category Certified
Message: 85% or above on a category. You are building the knowledge that protects guests and keeps establishments out of court.

Title: 100% Club
Message: 100% on a category. You did not just study it — you mastered it.

Message: Every category at 85% or above. You have covered the full spectrum of responsible alcohol service.

Title: Top Server
Message: Top 5%. You scored 95% or higher. The exam has nothing left to surprise you with.

Title: Flawless
Message: 100% on the final exam. Perfect responsible service knowledge. That is rare and you earned it.
